title: Oil reaches $100 after Houthi attacks on Saudi tankers
summary: Crude oil prices rise to their highest level in months due to supply disruptions from conflicts in the Middle East, fueling inflation fears.

title: ECB keeps rates at 2.25% and postpones hikes until September
summary: The central bank pauses its tightening cycle amid economic uncertainty and rising inflation caused by the oil price surge.

title: Bond yields rise to record highs on oil and ECB expectations
summary: Sovereign debt yields surge on the prospect of persistent inflation and central bank caution.

title: Wall Street falls as Alphabet and Tesla results and oil rally weigh
summary: The Dow Jones falls 500 points, and the S&P 500 and Nasdaq also post heavy losses amid concerns over AI spending and the Middle East conflict.

title: Cryptocurrency exchange BitMEX shuts down after money laundering violations revealed
summary: The platform suspends operations as authorities investigate illicit fund movements.

title: Two drone stocks recommended for investment in their rapid growth
summary: Financial firms highlight the potential of the unmanned vehicle market as an investment opportunity.

title: Blackstone beats earnings estimates and halts withdrawals in its flagship fund
summary: The asset manager benefits from AI investments and stabilizes capital outflows in its private credit funds.

title: US refineries run at full capacity amid global fuel crisis
summary: Refining capacity reaches 96.2% due to crude shortages and high demand, exacerbated by international conflicts.

title: European gas prices hit highest since Iran war on winter uncertainty
summary: Wholesale natural gas prices surge due to rapid depletion of reserves and doubts about Russian supply to Europe.

title: Ibex 35 loses 19,300 points dragged by oil and ECB caution
summary: The Spanish benchmark falls 1.41% in a session marked by rising crude and anticipation of new monetary signals.
